references.hebrew: וּמִי֙ כְּעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל גּ֥וֹי אֶחָ֖ד בָּאָ֑רֶץ אֲשֶׁר֩ הָלַ֨ךְ הָאֱלֹהִ֜ים לִפְדּ֧וֹת ל֣וֹ עָ֗ם לָשׂ֤וּם לְךָ֙ שֵׁ֚ם גְּדֻלּ֣וֹת וְנֹרָא֔וֹת לְגָרֵ֗שׁ מִפְּנֵ֧י עַמְּךָ֛ אֲשֶׁר־פָּדִ֥יתָ מִמִּצְרַ֖יִם גּוֹיִֽם׃
references.english: And who is like Your people Israel, a unique nation on earth, whom You,eYou Heb. 3rd person. God, went and redeemed as YourfYour See previous note. people, winning renown for Yourself for great and marvelous deeds, driving out nations before Your people whom You redeemed from Egypt.
references.matched_snippet: ומי כעמך ישראל גוי אחד בארץ

commentary_links.hebrew: דִּבְרֵ֤י חֲכָמִים֙ כַּדָּ֣רְבֹנ֔וֹת וּֽכְמַשְׂמְר֥וֹת נְטוּעִ֖ים בַּעֲלֵ֣י אֲסֻפּ֑וֹת נִתְּנ֖וּ מֵרֹעֶ֥ה אֶחָֽד׃
commentary_links.english: The sayings of the wise are like goads, like nails fixed in prodding sticks.oin prodding sticks Meaning of Heb. uncertain. They were given by one Shepherd.pThey were given by one Shepherd Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Emendation yields “They are accounted as a sharp ox goad” (post-biblical mardeaʻ).
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וכמשמרות נטועים בעלי אספות נתנו מרועה

commentary_links.hebrew: וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר אֱלֹהִ֔ים אֵ֛ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה לֵאמֹֽר׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english: God spoke all these words,athese words Tradition varies as to the division of the Commandments in vv. 2–14, and as to the numbering of the verses from 2 on. Cf. note at Deut. 5.6. saying:
commentary_links.matched_snippet: כל המעשים ברוך הוא דכתיב וידבר אלהים

commentary_links.english:
ס GOD’s counselacounsel Or “secret.” is for those who show reverence;
to them the covenant is made known.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ובריתו להודיעם &star אמר לו לך אמור להם אל
